title: Myped
description:
A whole mod pack in one mod! Rich lore and endless possibilities! Support for this mod is disabled! The mod's source code is free for use and add-ons (requires credit):
https://github.com/Deskped/MyPED
body:
# 😉 MyPED — a NOW NOT global Minecraft mod for Forge 1.20.1
# Support for this mod is disabled! The mod's source code is free for use and add-ons (requires credit):
# https://github.com/Deskped/MyPED

# Warning! This description of mod is no longer valid for version 5.0. The mod has been seriously damaged and remade.

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀  ⠀⠀   ![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/733bc16baceb2cf96d218ee57fca206f47e0cb35.png)

✨ **MyPED is Minecraft where the player is the main hero.**  
The mod makes survival harder and more engaging, adding unique items, blocks, and mechanics, along with an atmosphere that changes the usual gameplay.  
> One mod that replaces an entire modpack.  
> A world with magic and unusual mechanics, without industrialization.  
> Monsters and the world grow stronger along with the player.  
> Survival here is not just a game — it’s a challenge.  

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀  ⠀⠀   ![MyPED](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/e2OUKbNb/images/352822f6ece420bc84c251ea9af1bdb0f2142873.png)

---

## 🎒 Key features of MyPED

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀  ⠀⠀   ![Into the void](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/e2OUKbNb/images/236904b9f5216f1a3bf11f7bf0bbf08db340b364.gif)

- 🔥 **One mod instead of a whole pack** — combines multiple ideas into a single survival experience.  
- 💔 **Only 7 hearts** — the game reminds you from the start that survival will be hard.  
- ⚔️ **Monsters and world scale with you** — the longer you live, the more dangerous it becomes.  
- 🚫 **No elytras, no unbreaking, no freebies** — pure, harsh survival.  
- 🎒 **Backpacks and new items** enhance convenience without breaking the balance.  

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀  ⠀⠀   ![Backpacks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/e2OUKbNb/images/cc6843335287dc83db52fa515ad7a3fd8b54689b.png)

---

## 🌌 Lore and unique mechanics

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀  ⠀⠀   ![Darkness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/e2OUKbNb/images/e3e64a2864fbf5e4bfc92376dd79e7ae10042f65.gif)

- MyPED has its **own story** woven into gameplay.  
- Darkness matters — without a light source, you see almost nothing.  
- A **giant End portal** shines in the sky as part of the lore.  
- Storytelling through items, biomes, and enemies — no boring books.  
- Masks, artifacts, and resources all tie into the mysteries of the world.  

---

## ⚔️ Weapons and items

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀  ⠀⠀   ![Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/e2OUKbNb/images/f5897977e11b3cf4d1421ac031bb9cfd31612421.png)

- Dozens of custom weapons: swords, spears, and cursed masks.  
- **Every item has a purpose:**  
  - Masks grant unique effects.  
  - Keys unlock secret mechanisms.  
  - Berries can heal you… or poison you.  
- Vanilla gameplay is enhanced, not replaced.  

---

## 🌱 Farming and food

- One-click harvesting and automatic replanting with bonuses.  
- New trees, berries, and fruits diversify survival.  
- Villagers trade food, ice cream, and fruits.  
- Food can be **poisoned**, crafted easily from plants.  

---

## 🌍 Atmosphere and world

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀  ⠀⠀   ![New dungeons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/e2OUKbNb/images/c4faa8e12fe41185b0451d1803fb3bda43f46b44.png)

- Dark biomes, new structures, and reworked mechanics.  
- Unique ambient sounds: wind, birds, warning signals, atmospheric music.  
- Background events and lore unfold during gameplay — you might hear whispers unexpectedly.  
- **Eclipse 🌑** — a black hole that affects the world dramatically.  

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀  ⠀⠀   ![NewSculk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/e2OUKbNb/images/40a0a29839dfa30ccf10d36909b8c544a10f2207.png)

---

## 🏆 For players who think they’ve seen everything

- Achievements that grant experience and unlock new challenges.  
- Constant updates and patches keep the mod fresh.  
- Collectibles, notes, and hidden secrets in the world.  
- Server support with controlled administration.  

---

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀  ⠀⠀   ![Credits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb8829fd63655739f1da5692a8b88f35fc34abc2.png)

Neozz — concept art and frequently appearing artist.  
DESKPED — community contributors, over half of the content.  
Kuwma — lead developer and owner.  

---
